THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MYRENG, JOSIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATAMOROS, DENISA JOSE $840.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $872.00, THE COURT ALLOCATES COMPARATIVE FAULT AS FOLLOWS: 60% TO MARIA GATDULA, 40% TO DENISA MATAMOROS. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. IF PLAINTIFF HAS ACCEPTED A NEGOTIATED PAYMENT OF $827.69 PREVIOUSLY TENDERED TO HER, DEFENDANT MATAMOROS SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR THAT PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
